Package i5.cb.graph.shapes

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    IGraphShape  
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    Arrow
    This is just an arrow head.
    Arrow2
    This is a complete arrow.
    ArrowL
    A horizontal arrow head pointing left.
    ArrowR
    A horizontal arrow with head pointing right.
    Banner  
    Bar
    This is a variant arrow head that is a bit vee-shaped.
    Caret
    This is a variant arrow head that is a bit vee-shaped.
    Circle
    Circle is virtually like Ellipse; the dimensions are set in CBUserObject.getSmallComponent
    Circular
    This is just an arrow head.
    Cloud  
    Cross  
    Diamond  
    DiRect
    A horizontal direction sign
    DiRectL
    A horizontal direction sign
    DiRectR
    A horizontal direction sign
    Dot
    This is just an arrow head.
    DoubleArrow
    A horizontal arrow with two heads.
    DownArrow
    This is a complete arrow.
    DownPentagon  
    DownTriangle  
    Ellipse  
    FolderL  
    FolderR  
    GraphShapePolygon
    This class is the base class for all shapes that are polygons.
    HalfArrow
    This is just an arrow head.
    Hexagon  
    House  
    Karo
    This is just an arrow head.
    Octagon  
    Page  
    Pentagon  
    PolygonShape
    A user-definable polygon shape.
    Rect  
    RevArrow
    This is just an arrow head.
    RoundRectangle  
    Septagon  
    SmallArrow
    This is a variant arrow head that is a bit vee-shaped.
    Square
    This is just an arrow head.
    StadionCurve
    A variant of a round rectangle shape where the curve radius creates full circle segments horizontally, so much like the 400m lane in a stadion.
    Star  
    Triangle  
    TriangleL  
    TriangleR  
    Tube  
    UpHexagon
    like Hexagon but with pointed side showing upwards
    UpStadionCurve
    A StadionCurve with the rounded part facing north-south instead east-west.
    VeeArrow
    This is a variant arrow head that is a bit vee-shaped.
    XCross
